mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bus_schedule (schedule_name, line_id, depart_time, arrive_time, duration, plate_number, vehicle_type, price, seat_total, seat_remaining, status, is_recommend, create_time, update_time, remark, create_user) VALUES (#{scheduleName}, #{lineId}, #{departTime}, #{arriveTime}, #{duration}, #{plateNumber}, #{vehicleType}, #{price}, #{seatTotal}, #{seatRemaining}, #{status}, #{isRecommend}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{createUser})
mapper.select:
SELECT -- 1. 车次主表全部信息 s.*,
-- 2. 线路表的 出发城市、到达城市 l.start_city, l.end_city,
-- 3. 关键：按 station_list 顺序查询站点名称，用逗号拼接 ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(st.station_name ORDER BY FIELD(st.station_id, l.station_list)) FROM station st WHERE FIND_IN_SET(st.station_id, l.station_list) ) AS stationNames,
-- 4. 可选：返回站点ID串（方便前端拆分） l.station_list AS stationIds
FROM bus_schedule s LEFT JOIN line l ON s.line_id = l.line_id WHERE s.schedule_id = #{scheduleId}
